name_en: Top Original Batch M13663 Black/Colorful ✨M13404 White/Colorful NXP chip compatible, dynamic chip ❤️ This Pochette Accessoires handbag is made of coated canvas, interpreting the dynamic style of the Louis Vuitton × Takashi Murakami collaboration with vibrant Monogram patterns. Calfskin trim and eye-catching metal hardware add exquisite details. Detachable shoulder strap and chain allow for flexible carrying. Size: 22x13x4cm
